dod_items.description: All declared Yunshu components and active SKILL.md entries are covered by a health gate.
Markdown links and version metadata are consistent after remediation.
Yunshu CLI behavior remains covered by regression tests and compile checks.
Defect report documents fixed redundancy, metadata gaps, generated artifacts, cross-platform wording, and file-scale assessment.

non_product_failures.cause: Health gate ran concurrently with pytest, which generated cache directories during the scan.

non_product_failures.claim: Enhanced health gate passes after cache cleanup
non_product_failures.cause: Health gate ran concurrently with py_compile, which generated scripts/__pycache__ during the scan.
